notes: Refers to someone who conducts research or scientific investigation. The plural form is identical to the singular.

sentences.german: Der Forscher arbeitet in einem Labor an der Universität.
sentences.english: The researcher works in a laboratory at the university.

sentences.german: Die Forscher haben eine neue Methode zur Krebsbehandlung entdeckt.
sentences.english: The researchers have discovered a new method for treating cancer.
